title: SkyrimNet Plugins Index
description: Machine-generated aggregate of all plugin manifests. Regenerated by build-index.yml on every push to main. Never edited by humans — PRs that modify index.json are rejected by validate.yml. Contains only fields the dashboard needs to render the browse page, filter, and sort. Anything else (description, external_url, homepage, invocation block, full mod metadata) is fetched from the individual plugin's manifest.json on detail view.

schema_version.description: Bump when the entry shape changes in a breaking way. Dashboard refuses unknown versions.

generated_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the last rebuild. Null before the first run.

id.description: Canonical plugin ID: 'plugins/{github-user}/{slug}'. Derived from the directory path by build-index.yml. User segment follows GitHub username rules (no consecutive hyphens). Slug segment has no consecutive hyphens and must contain at least one letter or hyphen (pure-digit slugs are forbidden to avoid collision with SkyrimNet's numeric-timestamp backup filename convention).

type.description: Copied from manifest.json. Controls dashboard card rendering (install button vs external-link button) and the 'installable only' filter in browse.

title.description: Copied from manifest.json. ASCII printable, no leading/trailing whitespace.

tagline.description: Short one-liner shown on browse cards. Copied from manifest.json.

author.description: GitHub username of the plugin author. Copied from manifest.json.

skyrimnet_version.description: SkyrimNet version this plugin was built against (e.g. '0-19-0-0'). Copied from manifest.json. Used by the dashboard's 'compatible with my install' filter.

nsfw.description: Copied from manifest.json. Controls whether this plugin is visible in the default (NSFW-off) browse view.

contents.description: Required for bundle plugins. Absent for listing plugins (they have no content files in the repo). File counts derived by walking the plugin directory.

mods.description: Always present (empty array when the plugin has no mod integrations). Subset of manifest.json's mods array: only 'file' (lowercased) and 'required'. Human-readable 'name' is fetched from the manifest on detail view.

file.description: Lowercase plugin or DLL filename. Matched case-insensitively against the user's installed plugin list.

first_published.description: Derived from: git log --reverse --format=%aI -- plugins/{user}/{slug}/ | head -1
